title: guillenia axillare
intro: Guillenia axillare, also known as the American burnet or wild strawberry, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and skin irritations, and have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, offering benefits like reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Herbal preparations of Guillenia axillare can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
